segments.text: The word of the LORD that came unto Hosea, the son of Beeri, in the days of Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, kings of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam the son of Joash, king of Israel.
The beginning of the word of the LORD by Hosea.
Go, take unto thee a wife of whoredoms and children of whoredoms: for the land hath committed great whoredom, departing from the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So he went and took Gomer the daughter of Diblaim; which conceived, and bare him a son.
Call his name Jezreel; for yet a little while, and I will avenge the blood of Jezreel upon the house of Jehu, and will cause to cease the kingdom of the house of Israel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will break the bow of Israel in the valley of Jezreel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And she conceived again, and bare a daughter.
Call her name Lo-ruhamah: for I will no more have mercy upon the house of Israel; but I will utterly take them away.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: Lo-ruhamah: that is, Not having obtained mercy
no more to: Heb. not add any more to
but: or, that I should altogether pardon them

segments.text: I will have mercy upon the house of Judah, and will save them by the LORD their God, and will not save them by bow, nor by sword, nor by battle, by horses, nor by horsemen.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Now when she had weaned Lo-ruhamah, she conceived, and bare a son.
Call his name Lo-ammi: for ye are not my people, and I will not be your God.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: Lo-ammi: that is, Not my people

segments.text: Yet the number of the children of Israel shall be as the sand of the sea, which cannot be measured nor numbered; and it shall come to pass, that in the place where it was said unto them, Ye are not my people, there it shall be said unto them, Ye are the sons of the living God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then shall the children of Judah and the children of Israel be gathered together, and appoint themselves one head, and they shall come up out of the land: for great shall be the day of Jezreel.
segments.speaker: The LORD
